description: ConfirmTkt is an Indian train travel service for IRCTC ticket booking and railway enquiry features such as PNR status, train running status, schedules, and station information. It is operated by Le Travenues Technology Ltd. and also links to related travel products like flights, buses, and hotels.
summary: ConfirmTkt exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.confirmtkt.com/trains-ai/mcp` and a publicly reachable HTTP/XML web API under `api.confirmtkt.com` / `confirmtkt.com/api`; no GraphQL API, OpenAPI spec, or CLI was found.
